name: dMY Technology Group, Inc. II
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. II was a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focused on identifying businesses in the consumer technology sector. In 2021, the company completed its business combination with Genius Sports Group, a leading provider of sports data technologies and services.
